channel.title: Joel Greenblatt — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED UNH (+30%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added UNH in Q4 2025 · 3.1% of portfolio. Adding aggressively on UnitedHealth's pullback.

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED META (+10%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added META in Q4 2025 · 3.4% of portfolio. Quality compounder add.

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED NVDA (+18%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added NVDA (NVIDIA CORPORATION) in Q4 2025 · 2.6% of portfolio.
